rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LUCY MAE GRIMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Sanctions For Probate Attorney, Matthew R. Mraule, Sbn: 263433, Judicial Abuse;...
rulings.Rulings: The motion of Jerome Grimes for sanctions is denied. Prevailing party is to prepare an appropriate order. Mr. Grimes must contact the court (415) 551-3702) if he intends to argue the tentative ruling; otherwise, the tentative will be adopted as a final ruling of the court.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE EMILIA DI FRANCO GLESSI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support Thereof; And, Exhibits A - F .
rulings.Rulings: Counsel for Petitioners must file and serve before March 6, 2014, a detailed declaration setting forth what any additional discovery would likely prove. The declaration must state with particularity what depositions (or other forms of discovery) are contemplated and how they are relevant to the fully briefed motion. Counsel for Respondent may respond to any filed declaration -- either orally at the hearing or in writing prior to March 6, 2014. If Respondent's counsel does not believe he has adequate time to respond to Petitioner's declaration, Respondent may request a one week's continuance of the hearing. If Respondent does not request a continuance, the Court will hear arguments on ALL issues on March 6, 2014.
